creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
mplayer uses libungif which is now dprecated
	mplayer detects libgif without problem
		if libungif is not installed.

Fix: Apply the patch.
	A bump of portrevision mmight be useful.
How-To-Repeat:
